headline: Western Gateway Pipeline Reconfiguration Could Be A Game Changer For Phillips 66 (PSX)
summary: On 20 April 2026, Phillips 66 and Kinder Morgan announced progress on the Western Gateway refined products pipeline, having secured long-term shipper commitments to advance a system linking Midwest and Gulf Coast refinery supply to Phoenix, California, and Las Vegas, with a targeted in-service date of mid-2029. A distinctive feature of this project is the planned reversal of both Kinder Morgan’s SFPP pipeline and Phillips 66’s Gold Pipeline, reconfiguring existing infrastructure to redirect...
